name: hono-auth
description: A monorepo with Bun, Hono, Vue, and Better Auth
author: Sean Ockert

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd shared && bun run dev" "cd server && bun run dev" "cd client && bun run dev"
scripts.build: cd shared && bun run build && cd ../server && bun run build && cd ../client && bun run build
scripts.deploy: cd server && bun run deploy && cd ../client && bun run deploy
scripts.postinstall: cd shared && bun run build && cd ../server && bun run build
